role_summary: Defines the standardized interface/contract for integrating and abstracting external Large Language Model (LLM) providers within the system.
finding: Establishes a provider-agnostic abstraction layer that standardizes AI interactions into two core modes: direct prompt generation and multi-turn conversational chat. Both modes enforce support for structured output (JSON mode) and asynchronous execution, enabling seamless swapping of underlying LLM backends while maintaining consistent system-level integration, predictable response formats, and non-blocking scalability.
